reviews.review_title: Menu startups screen way too large...
reviews.review_description:
Besides the size of the menu is the relative low quality and hardly any options to change view this app is not for me.

I rather use the PC to upload only the files I want to see and not the whole not edited files from my inst360 X4 which takes ages to load into my Quest 3.

developer_response.body:
Dear Bddsgn, 

Sorry to hear it didn't perform as you would like. We are aiming for simple over power features, however what options would you like to see? We have in the advanced area a number of adjustments. 

We are challenged by certain constraints - the speed of the wifi in the camera, and Meta not allowing direct access to the USB.

Best regards,

Pauerview
